taxonomy: Meniocus huetii is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae. It belongs to the genus Meniocus, which is a group of flowering plants native to Southeast Asia. The classification of Meniocus huetii is further divided into the kingdom Plantae, clade Angiosperms, clade Eudicots, and clade Asterids. This classification suggests that Meniocus huetii is closely related to other flowering plants in the Gesneriaceae family. The exact classification of Meniocus huetii is still a matter of ongoing research and study in the scientific community.
